feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Edit access to user's timesheet
entry.content:
We need to provide edit access to a user so they can submit someone else’s timesheet on their behalf. Could you please guide us on how to provide this access, if applicable?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: creation of new depreciation keys
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we are looking forward to create new depreciations keys to select in assets .

 

However, I could not find any customizing options for it and in sap documentation shows we need to request for it in sap help .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: TDS Adjustment Entry and impact on the TDS report
entry.content:
During transactions such as MIRO or FB60, if TDS was deducted incorrectly (e.g., 2% instead of 1%, or vice versa), the correct approach to pass a rectification or adjustment entry.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tax Code Valid Date Change
entry.content:
Hi,

we have an discussion point regarding the tax code change valid period and ELSTER tax formular in Germany.

Its about the alignment of the tax code items in the ELSTER formular, specially time depended taxes change subannual.

Example thought:

-> Change of the tax code from 19 to 16% per 1. July XXXX

->  still in July/August some invoices will have the old tax code (19%)

Please explain us the correct handling with the VAT return handling with the tax code items.

How SAP will handle the subannual change of an tax code values, because for the ELSTER form we will need two tax code groups for 16 and 19%, its not possible to only handle it with one tax group.

Their will be still invoices with the old tax code value.

 

With best regards,

Josi

entry.title: Controle the issuance for consumption w.r.t prod. order in 2-3 different days from store
entry.content:
Dear Team,

As per the requirement, the business wants to control or follow the rule for sequential issuance of some consumable materialsw.r.t. production order in 2-3 different days. As we know on production order creation reservation is getting created automatically into the system. There should be some provision or system or features  that suppose out of 20 components in single production order/reservation, the production people can able to request to store department to issue 10 components in one day, for other left components on another days. So that the reason for delay in issuance from store can be tracked and  space constraint the system could able to match the standard practice of business.

entry.title: Is this possible to cancel Billing Document automatically In SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

IS it possible to cancel E-way Bill E-invoice and Billing document automatically in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

Any BADI or other solution using the same we can achieve the result.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Default Issuing Plant and Issuing storage location in STO
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement from our customer. They wanted to save a few steps when creating an STO i.e. defaulting value on a couple of fields. Most of the fields for default values are supported by SAP i.e. through user settings - default values and master data, except the two fields below.

  1. Supplying Plant - can this be added as another option in the user settings i.e. default values?
  2. Issuing storage location - is this possible in Public Cloud?

Regards,

Fideli

entry.title: Create the new material type copying from HALB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I’m working on S/4HANA Public Edition and just set up a custom material type by referencing HALB. I want materials with this new type to behave exactly like HALB across Purchasing, MRP, and Costing.

I’d like to know if creating custom material types is fully supported as a standard practice in the Public Edition. Also, are there
any constraints or risks I should be aware of regarding its impact on other business processes?

entry.title: Skipped Set Up Organizational Structure?how can I fixed it
entry.content:
In the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, I did not set up Company Code A through CBC. Instead, I directly created Company Code A in the public cloud customizing environment, similar to how it's done in GUI. Later, when I tried to configure the organizational structure in CBC, I received an error stating that Company Code A already exists. Now I want to delete Company Code A, but after searching for information, I found that in the public cloud system, a company code cannot be directly deleted—it can only be deactivated.

My questions are:

① Since CBC is not configured yet, can I directly delete Company Code A in the customizing environment if it has no related configurations?

② After deactivating it in the customizing environment, can I start over and configure Company Code A in the CBC environment, then activate and use it in the customizing environment? Or do I have to use a new Company Code B?

entry.title: BP TAN exemption details update as a mass
entry.content:
Dear sir

In business partner, Supplier: country- spec.Enh view If "Withhld tax type" field is G1 to be update the "Exemption reason" filed  & Exemption number, Exempt from, Exempt To field to update as a mass. How to update.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FUE consumption calculation with development price category
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm in an implementation project of SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition. The Starter, Dev (customizing and development tenant) and Test system has been provisioned. Production system has not been provisioned yet.

In the development tenant of dev system, I have 4 business users of development price category which consumes 8 FUE. When I check the FUE consumption in SAP for me, I see the measured value 8.

Then I go to development tenant, and remove business roles of development price category from 3 business users, and only leave 1 business user of development price category. Then the utilized value is supposed to be updated to 1, and measured value to 2.

However, when I check the FUE consumption in SAP for me again, it doesn't change. Utilized value is still 4, and measured value is still 8.

So is there any business users in other tenant also counted as utilization except in development tenant, or it's just because SAP for me hasn't been refreshed instantly?

Thanks.

entry.title: cXML for Service type requisitions lines
entry.content:
We make use of punchout catalogs to create material requisition items.

We would also like to be able to add items as Service type Items from that punchout catalog.

What Items/Tags need to be populated/not populated  in the cXML in order to add a line as a service line from the punchout catalog ?

The punchout catalog is used in S4 HANA Public cloud - NOT ARIBA

entry.title: Posting on Header Level WBS (SAP PS Public Cloud)
entry.content: Please explain how the Posting has been happened as we have not uploaded/assigned budget for the Header level WBS. Because at the time of Supplementing/Transferring/Returning the Budget for any WBS of this Project we are getting error – Please assign or supplement the budget to the Header WBS.

entry.title: In the Valuation Balance app, rent increase does not update succeeding opening/closing balances
entry.content:
In the Valuation Balance app (Cash Flow Data for Valuation) report, rent increase/decrease does not update succeeding opening/closing balances.

When increasing the rent in a lease contract, the Valuation Balance app only shows the adjusted opening/ending balances of the asset/liability but does not highlight the change. This leads to the opening and closing balances not being the same in the subsequent month after the change.

Can we have a report where remeasurements like this are included?

• Lease asset: opening balance + remeasurement – depreciation = ending balance
• Lease liability: opening balance + remeasurement (should be equal to the amount in the lease asset) – payment + interest accretion = ending balance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Scope added but nodes are not there for aATP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We have added two scopes (1JW, 6N0) in the CBC server for aATP; however, their corresponding paths/nodes are not appearing in the IMG screen.

Reqeusting you to help us to get the nodes of aATP.

 

Regards,

Tushar

entry.title: Invoice ERROR
entry.content:
Here is the English translation of the SAP error message text:

Diagnosis

If the following conditions are met, invoice line items received multiple times via EDI/SOA can be settled:

  • Goods receipt–based invoice verification is defined for the purchase order line item.

  • The goods receipt number (delivery note number) is included in the IDoc or SOA message.

  • A differential invoice is used and a previous invoice already exists (as the second invoice). In other words, according to the two-line item concept, for each goods receipt line item or purchase order line item, both the current line item (invoice line item) and the line item from the previous invoice (credit memo line item) are displayed.

System Response

If these conditions are not met, posting of the IDoc or SOA message is canceled.

Procedure

Check the IDoc or SOA message. In some cases, the IDoc or SOA message can be edited (for example, if the supplier accidentally sent the wrong purchase order line item). If it cannot be edited, contact the supplier and request that they resend the invoice with corrected data.

Let me know if you need any adjustments to the translation.

entry.title: Valuation of produced material - moving average price
entry.content:
Hello, 
we have the following situation: we are purchasing a trading good which is valuated with moving average price. Sometimes small adaption has to be done. Therefore a bill of material with routing is set up. Speciality: the material number does not change, the material itself is consumed in the production order, but also output of the production order. When we create a production order, the planned price does not include the routing from the bill of material - the system just valuates the ouput of the current moving average price of the input material. Only when the production order is closed the variances also settle to inventory. How can we customize the system, that in case a product with moving average valuation is produced, output of the production order should be valuated with the total planned costs and not with the actual moving averape price?

Best regards
Anja

entry.title: Can MRP prioritize one BOM alternative component and fall back to another based on availability?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question regarding SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and the behavior of MRP with alternative components in production.

Let’s say I have:

  • Product A as the finished product

  • Raw Material B as the main/preferred component

  • Raw Material C as an alternative component that can also be used to produce Product A

My business requirement is the following:

When MRP runs for Product A, I want the system to first consider Raw Material B as the priority component. If B is not available in stock, then I want the system to recommend using Raw Material C instead.

So the expected logic would be something like:

  • Use B first

  • If B is unavailable, then propose C as the alternative

My understanding so far is that in standard SAP Public Cloud, alternative items in the BOM can be maintained with priority, but MRP itself may not behave as a true fallback logic during planning. It seems the alternative can be handled later at the production order/component level rather than directly in the MRP recommendation.

Could you please confirm the following:

  1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, can MRP itself recommend the alternative component automatically based on stock availability?

  2. Or is this only handled later by the planner in the production order?

  3. If standard MRP does not support this exact fallback behavior, what is the best-practice approach in Public Cloud?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Clarification on Missing Attachments in Singapore GST Return Report
entry.content:
The system did not create any attachment for line items for Singapore GST return report in Run Statutory Reports app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Managing Authorization for Plan Customer Projects App
entry.content:
Hello SAP!

In Plan Customer Projects App, we need to restrict the user to only add the customer reference number and in the billing tab. User can open the billing due date, but they must not have any other editing option.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
